status.description: completed = ran and produced verified finding(s); no_findings = ran cleanly, nothing proven; error = could not complete.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence summary of what was tested and the outcome.

findings.description: ONLY findings whose exploitation was concretely PROVEN against an oracle. Never include unproven/theoretical issues here.

asset.description: In-scope host the finding is on.

verified.description: MUST be true to be in this array. False ⇒ move it to leads_unverified.

oracle.description: What concretely proved it (e.g. 'OOB DNS hit on canary abc.oob.example', 'second account read user-A order', 'alert(nonce) fired in headless browser').

evidence.description: Reproducible proof: exact request(s)+response field(s), ordered steps, or tool output. Enough for a human to re-verify.

report_path.description: Filename of the report .md written in the workspace (report_<class>_<slug>_<date>.md).

dedupe_key.description: Stable key 'vuln_class:host:normalized-endpoint' for dedupe across runs.

leads_unverified.description: Promising but UNPROVEN leads. Never reported or pushed; recorded for a human/next run.

why_unproven.description: What's missing to prove it (needs creds, needs browser, WAF blocked, not reproducible, etc.).

tested_ruled_out.description: Things tested and ruled out this run (persisted to memory so future runs skip them).
